blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,801 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
